title: Egestabase – An online evidence platform to discover and explore options to recover plant nutrients from human excreta and domestic wastewater for reuse in agriculture
author: Harder, Metson, et al.
description: Review Highlights•Egestabase is a goldmine of evidence from research and practice on the recovery and reuse of plant nutrients found in human excreta and domestic wastewater.•Egestabase is based on a coherent conceptual framework and enables searching with standardized terminology.•This enables users to explore the option space and quickly navigate and find associated literature.
